author: Dexterity104
title: Variance-reduction miner: deterministic decoding + self-consistency completeness
notes: General high/critical miner for sn60__bitsec across Solidity, Vyper, Rust, Move and Cairo. Optimizes for the project-pass metric (fully solve a project in >=2 of 3 runs), not finding volume: fully deterministic decoding (temperature 0, no reasoning_effort) to cut run-to-run variance, and a triage -> deep -> self-consistency recheck pipeline that re-audits the same core files with an independent lens and unions the findings so a single run captures ALL of a project's expected bugs. Tightened ~690s runtime envelope with a reserved final pass to keep invalid runs at zero, a gentle low-confidence gate for precision, per-file emit cap, and model-free structural probes. Findings localized to exact file and function. No project-specific or benchmark-specific content.
